author: Youcef Mammar
subject: feat(insights): add insights support to Hits widget (algolia/vue-instantsearch#665)
body:
* feat(insights): add insights support to Hits widget **Summary** This integrates insights with Vue Instantsearch to help using Click Analytics in Hits. Using `connectHitsWithInsights` instead of `connectHits` exposed a new property `insights` to the internal state, which user can call to emit insights events. **Result** ```html
``` * fix: typo Co-Authored-By: tkrugg * fix: prettier * fix: expose insights in item slot
